Variables.Name: SkelMeshComponents
Variables.Description:
The skeletal mesh components used with the socket location module.
	 	This is to prevent them from being garbage collected.

Variables.Name: bUpdateOnDedicatedServer
Variables.Description: whether to update the particle system on dedicated servers

Variables.Name: bAllowRecycling
Variables.Description:
If true, this Particle System will be available for recycling after it has completed. Auto-destroyed systems cannot be recycled.
	  Some systems (currently particle trail effects) can recycle components to avoid respawning them to play new effects.
	  This is only an optimization and does not change particle system behavior, aside from not triggering normal component initialization events more than once.

Variables.Name: bAutoManageAttachment
Variables.Description:
True if we should automatically attach to AutoAttachParent when activated, and detach from our parent when completed.
	  This overrides any current attachment that may be present at the time of activation (deferring initial attachment until activation, if AutoAttachParent is null).
	  When enabled, detachment occurs regardless of whether AutoAttachParent is assigned, and the relative transform from the time of activation is restored.
	  This also disables attachment on dedicated servers, where we don't actually activate even if bAutoActivate is true.
	  @see AutoAttachParent, AutoAttachSocketName, AutoAttachLocationType

Variables.Name: bOverrideLODMethod
Variables.Description: indicates that the component's LODMethod overrides the Template's

Variables.Name: bSkipUpdateDynamicDataDuringTick
Variables.Description:
Flag indicating that dynamic updating of render data should NOT occur during Tick.
	 	This is used primarily to allow for warming up and simulated effects to a certain state.

Variables.Name: LODMethod
Variables.Description: The method of LOD level determination to utilize for this particle system

Variables.Name: RequiredSignificance
Variables.Description: The significance this component requires of it's emitters for them to be enabled.

Variables.Name: bShouldUseTagGetSkeletalMesh
Variables.Description:
Array holding name instance parameters for this ParticleSystemComponent.
	 	Parameters can be used in Cascade using DistributionFloatVectorParticleParameters.

Variables.Name: SecondsBeforeInactive
Variables.Description:
Number of seconds of emitter not being rendered that need to pass before it
	  no longer gets ticked becomes inactive.

Variables.Name: MaxTimeBeforeForceUpdateTransform
Variables.Description:
Time between forced UpdateTransforms for systems that use dynamically calculated bounds,
	  Which is effectively how often the bounds are shrunk.

Variables.Name: ReplayClips
Variables.Description: Array of replay clips for this particle system component.  These are serialized to disk.  You really should never add anything to this in the editor.  It's exposed so that you can delete clips if you need to, but be careful when doing so!

Variables.Name: CustomTimeDilation
Variables.Description: Scales DeltaTime in UParticleSystemComponent::Tick(...)

Variables.Name: bIsPCPlatformResource
Variables.Description: Is PC Redirect Particle Resource

Variables.Name: AutoAttachParent
AutoAttachSocketName
Variables.Description:
Socket we automatically attach to on the AutoAttachParent, if bAutoManageAttachment is true.
	  @see bAutoManageAttachment

Variables.Name: AutoAttachLocationRule
Variables.Description:
Options for how we handle our location when we attach to the AutoAttachParent, if bAutoManageAttachment is true.
	  @see bAutoManageAttachment, EAttachmentRule

Variables.Name: AutoAttachRotationRule
Variables.Description:
Options for how we handle our rotation when we attach to the AutoAttachParent, if bAutoManageAttachment is true.
	  @see bAutoManageAttachment, EAttachmentRule

Variables.Name: AutoAttachScaleRule
Variables.Description:
Options for how we handle our scale when we attach to the AutoAttachParent, if bAutoManageAttachment is true.
	  @see bAutoManageAttachment, EAttachmentRule

Variables.Name: EditorLODLevel
Variables.Description: INTERNAL. Used by the editor to set the LODLevel

Variables.Name: EditorDetailMode
Variables.Description: Used for applying Cascade's detail mode setting to in-level particle systems

Variables.Name: AutoAttachLocationType_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
DEPRECATED: Options for how we handle our location when we attach to the AutoAttachParent, if bAutoManageAttachment is true.
	  @see bAutoManageAttachment, EAttachLocation::Type

Functions.Name: ClearSystemFixedBounds
Functions.Description: Clear any previously set fixed bounds for the system instance.

Functions.Name: SetAutoAttachParams
Functions.Description: DEPRECATED: Set AutoAttachParent, AutoAttachSocketName, AutoAttachLocationType to the specified parameters. Does not change bAutoManageAttachment; that must be set separately.

Params.Description: Component to attach to.

Params.Name: SocketName

Params.Name: LocationType
Params.Description: Option for how we handle our location when we attach to Parent.

Functions.Name: SetAutoAttachmentParameters

Functions.Name: SetVectorParameter
Functions.Description:
Set a named vector instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.
	 	Updates the parameter if it already exists, or creates a new entry if not.

Functions.Description:
Set a named color instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.
	 	Updates the parameter if it already exists, or creates a new entry if not.

Functions.Name: SetActorParameter
Functions.Description:
Set a named actor instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.
	 	Updates the parameter if it already exists, or creates a new entry if not.

Functions.Name: SetMaterialParameter
Functions.Description:
Set a named material instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.
	 	Updates the parameter if it already exists, or creates a new entry if not.

Functions.Name: SetTemplate
Functions.Description: Change the ParticleSystem used by this ParticleSystemComponent

Functions.Name: GetNumActiveParticles
Functions.Description: Get the current number of active particles in this system

Functions.Name: BeginTrails
Functions.Description: Begins all trail emitters in this component.

Params.Name: InFirstSocketName
Params.Description: The name of the first socket for the trail.

Params.Name: InSecondSocketName
Params.Description: The name of the second socket for the trail.

Params.Name: InWidthMode
Params.Description: How the width value is applied to the trail.

Params.Name: InWidth
Params.Description: The width of the trail.

Functions.Name: EndTrails
Functions.Description: Ends all trail emitters in this component.

Functions.Name: SetTrailSourceData
Functions.Description: Sets the defining data for all trails in this component.

Params.Name: InFirstSocketName
Params.Description: The name of the first socket for the trail.

Params.Name: InSecondSocketName
Params.Description: The name of the second socket for the trail.

Params.Name: InWidthMode
Params.Description: How the width value is applied to the trail.

Params.Name: InWidth
Params.Description: The width of the trail.

Functions.Name: CreateNamedDynamicMaterialInstance
Functions.Description: Creates a Dynamic Material Instance for the specified named material override, optionally from the supplied material.

Functions.Name: GetNamedMaterial
Functions.Description: Returns a named material. If this named material is not found, returns NULL.

Params.Name: InEventName
Params.Description: The name of the event that fired.

Params.Name: InEmitterTime
Params.Description: The emitter time when the event fired.

Params.Name: InLocation
Params.Description: The location of the particle when the event fired.

Params.Name: InVelocity
Params.Description: The velocity of the particle when the event fired.

Set a named random vector instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.

Functions.Name: SetFloatRandParameter

Set a named random float instance parameter on this ParticleSystemComponent.
